positive: A breathtaking celestial map composition featuring stylized lunar phases intersecting with geometric mountain ranges and flowing cosmic nebula elements. The style is highly detailed, elegant scientific illustration combined with modern minimalist linocut print aesthetics. Composition must be symmetrical, centered, and designed to fill a textile print space. Use deep indigo, rich teal, antique gold, and matte cream tones. Focus on clean, thick silhouettes and delicate cross-hatching lines. Dramatic, balanced contrast with a pseudo-stained glass look. Vector quality, high contrast, detailed contour lines, isolated on a neutral background.
negative: blurry, artifact, text, watermark, logo, signature, lowres, poorly drawn, deformed, bad anatomy, extra limbs, ugly, noise, jpeg artifacts, low detail, gradient, photorealism
